nasb.text: It is an abomination for kings to commit wicked acts, For a throne is established on righteousness.

esv.text: It is an abomination to kings to do evil, for the throne is established by righteousness.

cnv.text: 作惡是君王所厭惡的， 因為王位是靠賴公義建立的。

ccb.text: 君王憎恨恶行， 因王位靠公义而立。

csbs.text: 行事邪恶，为君王所憎恶， 因为王位藉着公义而坚立。
